contig_naming: bare (1, 2, ..., X, Y, MT) — matches the ClinVar VCF and REVEL index convention used across this project
checksum_policy: The whole-genome FASTA is a local-only, gitignored cache. install_grch38.sh records the installed file's SHA-256 + provenance into GRCh38.fa.meta.json via `engine.reference_cache --record`. Pin that digest via RECLASS_GRCH38_SHA256 (or --sha256) to make loads tamper-evident.

alternate_sources.name: GRCh38 no-alt analysis set (GCA_000001405.15_GRCh38_no_alt_analysis_set)
alternate_sources.note: chr-prefixed contig names; normalize_chrom() strips the leading 'chr' on lookup.

note: Reference-backed left-alignment only reads short windows around each locus, so any faithful GRCh38 primary assembly yields identical normalization. The committed sha256 is intentionally left to install time (see checksum_policy) so a site records the digest of the genome it actually installed.
